hero.title: A converting landing page for €200. Ready in 5 business days.
hero.subtitle: Full website, contact form, domain, hosting and support. No hidden fees, no delays.

trust.label: Trusted by businesses in Lithuania, Latvia, Estonia

pricing.subtitle: A one-time fee for the landing — and a free choice of whether you want ongoing support.
pricing.note: Subscription starts from month 2. First month is included in the €200. Cancel anytime — your site stays yours.

bullets: Up to 2 hours of edits per month

bullets: Up to 30 min of edits per month

portfolio.subtitle: All landing pages launched within 5 business days. All live today.

process.h2: How it works in 5 business days
process.subtitle: No delays, no 'I'll get back to you next week'. Clear stages, clear accountability.
process.guarantee: If we're late due to our side — next month of Care is free.

steps.title: Brief
steps.body: 30-min call. We fill out a mini-questionnaire: who the landing is for, what the offer is, what contacts we're collecting.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We build the full layout in Figma. One revision round — we agree on the final version.

steps.title: Development
steps.body: We build the site. Connect the form, analytics, domain.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We check the mobile version, hand over access, go live.

forWhom.h2: Who this landing page is for
forWhom.subtitle: Three segments where our format delivers the fastest results.

items.title: Small B2B
items.body: Manufacturers, suppliers, distributors. A website is needed for major clients and partners — to showcase cases, products, contacts.

items.title: Private specialists
items.body: Coaches, psychologists, lawyers, nutritionists. The website is the primary booking and trust channel.

items.title: Local services
items.body: Auto shops, barbershops, clinics. The site collects leads from Google Maps and ads.

faq.subtitle: Questions that come up before every purchase. If yours isn't here — just ask.

items.q: What if I don't like the design?
items.a: That's the most common concern. Before any coding we create the design in Figma — easy to change there. 2 revision rounds are included in the €200. If it still doesn't work after that — I refund 50% for the hours spent.

items.q: What happens if I stop paying €15 for Care?
items.a: The site stays yours. Domain transferred to your name within 7 days. You can move the site to your own hosting, come back to Care/Growth anytime, or freeze the account for up to 3 months.

items.q: Can you build it in multiple languages?
items.a: Yes. Standard options: LT + EN or LT + RU — included in €200. For 3+ languages — +€50 per additional language. All our sites support 5 languages out of the box: LT, LV, ET, EN, RU.

items.q: What technology do you use? Can I migrate?
items.a: We use Next.js 14 — open source, the most popular framework in 2026. The code is yours, hosted on Vercel. We hand over all code on GitHub in your name. We're not a closed system like Wix or Tilda.

items.q: Can it be expanded to multiple pages later?
items.a: Yes, common scenario. We start with a landing (quick launch), then grow: +About page (€50), +Blog with CMS (€150), +Catalog (€200), +E-commerce (from €500). No rebuilding from scratch.

items.q: Do you provide an official contract and invoice?
items.a: Yes. Contract — signed digitally before we start. VAT invoice after payment. Payment by bank transfer or card via Stripe. EU businesses with VAT ID — reverse charge applies.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Bank transfer (SEPA), card via Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), Apple Pay / Google Pay, Revolut Business.
You do, from day one. We register it in your name or your company's. If you already have a domain — we just connect it. Annual renewal (~€10–15) included in Care/Growth subscription.

items.q: What if the landing page doesn't work — too few leads?
items.a: First we measure. Every site gets analytics and conversion tracking. If conversion is below 1%, on the Growth plan we run A/B tests and update copy based on data — at no extra charge.

items.q: How much of my time does this require?
items.a: Realistically — 3–4 hours total: Brief (1 hr), copy review (1 hr), design review (30 min), final check (1 hr). Everything via Telegram + 2 short Zoom calls.

cta.subtitle: We'll send you a personal proposal with exact timelines within an hour.

business.label: What do you do?
business.placeholder: E.g., barbershop in Vilnius or B2B equipment sales

site.label: Current website
site.placeholder: If you have one — drop the link

cta.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Write to me directly: @balticlanding
cta.replyNote: We reply within 1 hour during business hours (9:00–18:00 EET). After hours — next morning.
cta.callBody: 15-min Zoom call. No obligations. I'll show you exactly what it would look like for your specific case.
